body.desc: The main topic or introduction, e.g., 'COMPANY INTRODUCTION'.

title.desc: The main title of the presentation, e.g., 'Capital that adapts to your business.'

subtitle.desc: A brief description or tagline, e.g., 'Revenue-based financing and cash-flow underwriting — connect'.

body_2.desc: Location information, e.g., 'Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam'.

body_3.desc: A separator or additional detail, e.g., '/'.
